title: botrychium simplex var. compositum
intro: Botrychium simplex var. compositum, also known as the compound rattlesnake fern, is a variety of the fern species Botrychium simplex, characterized by its compound fronds. The medicinal properties of this plant are primarily attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Botrychium simplex var. compositum include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from the dried fronds, which can be infused in hot water to create a tea, or used in tinctures and capsules for medicinal purposes.
